headlines.title: Steve Kornacki: America 250 poll shows nation marked by doubt and pessimism
headlines.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki joins Meet the Press to break down a new NBC News poll ahead of the nation’s 250 birthday next month, with most saying the U.S. has already seen its best days and over one-fifth of respondents saying they are only a little or not at all proud to be Americans.

headlines.title: Democrats maintain an edge in the fight for Congress as Trump gets poor marks
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s poor approval rating continues to weigh down his party ahead of the midterms — though the GOP has a slim measure of separation from the president, with Democrats holding a 5-point lead in the battle for control of Congress, according to a new national NBC News poll

headlines.title: Poll: 57% of Americans Disapprove of Trump’s Job Performance
headlines.description: Meet the Press Moderator Kristen Welker joins Sunday TODAY’s Willie Geist to discuss new NBC News polling that shows how Americans feel about President Donald Trump’s job performance amid the war in Iran and ahead of the country’s 250 birthday. “That’s a new low for his second term and of course it does come, as we know, as this war is deeply unpopular, that President Trump has been underwater in his handling of the economy,” Kirsten says.

headlines.title: Knicks win first NBA championship since 1973, beat Spurs 94-90 in Game 5
headlines.description: The New York Knicks won their first NBA championship in 53 years after beating the San Antonio Spurs 94-90 in Game 5 of the NBA Finals.

headlines.title: Just one game in, Brazil and Carlo Ancelotti are already under fire
headlines.description: Brazil and manager Carlo Ancelotti are already facing harsh scrutiny after just one World Cup game, a 1-1 draw with Morocco.

headlines.title: Coaching the U.S. was a big test for Mauricio Pochettino. Then his World Cup opener went ‘amazing.’
headlines.description: Pochettino, a 54-year-old Argentine, has been on the job for 20 months, but Friday’s game was unquestionably his biggest opportunity to make an impression on a wider fanbase tuning in to watch the U.S. for the first time.

headlines.title: Folarin Balogun chose the U.S. over England. It’s already paying off in the World Cup.
headlines.description: Folarin Balogun, born in Brooklyn but raised in London, agreed to play his international career with the Americans in 2023. Three years later he opened the World Cup with two goals.

headlines.title: Julian Nagelsmann: “Estamos listos para comenzar nuestro camino en el Mundial”
headlines.description: Para Julian Nagelsmann, el estreno mundialista representa el momento de llevar al campo todo lo trabajado durante la preparación. El técnico alemán recordó que en una competición cada detalle cuenta y los errores pueden marcar el destino de una selección.

headlines.title: La fiesta caribeña llega al ritmo de Curazao en la Copa Mundial
headlines.description: Curazao llega con gran ánimo para enfrentar a Alemania en su debut mundialista. Quieren dar una gran impresión ante el mundo en Houston.

headlines.title: La roja más famosa de la historia fue para un chileno | Vive el Mundial
headlines.description: Carlos Caszely pasó a la historia al convertirse en el primer expulsado de una Copa Mundial. Revive la acción que marcó para siempre el duelo entre Chile y Alemania Occidental en el Mundial de 1974.

headlines.title: Cuenta regresiva para Alemania: el viaje hacia su estreno en la Copa Mundial
headlines.description: La selección de Alemania hará su estreno en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA. Con rostros de máxima concentración y el respaldo de sus aficionados, la Mannschaft se prepara para dar el primer paso en su búsqueda de la gloria mundialista.

headlines.title: Manuel Neuer llega enfocado y en gran forma para el debut de Alemania
headlines.description: Manuel Neuer afronta su quinto Mundial con la concentración y experiencia que lo han convertido en una leyenda. Tras superar sus molestias físicas y recuperar ritmo competitivo, el arquero se declara listo para liderar a Alemania en su debut ante Curazao.
